page: Amazon Web Services r8ib.metal-96xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server instance featuring dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. The system is equipped with 192 physical cores and 384 virtual CPUs running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz, with 2.0 threads per core. It features a substantial memory capacity of 3072.0 GB, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 200 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. However, the r8ib.metal-96xl does not include local NVMe storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached storage options. Additionally, the instance does not feature any GPU accelerators, limiting its utility for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning workloads.

As a bare-metal instance with a massive memory footprint and high-density dedicated CPU resources, the r8ib.metal-96xl offers high resource density for enterprise workloads. It is designed for large-scale memory-intensive applications, such as in-memory databases, large-scale data analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy virtualization workloads that require direct access to physical hardware resources without hypervisor overhead.
description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.metal-96xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications. It features dedicated Intel x86_64 processors with 192 physical cores and 384 vCPUs operating at 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 3072.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 200 Gbps. Tradeoffs include the complete absence of local storage and GPU accelerators, requiring reliance on network-attached storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-heavy data processing workloads that benefit from direct physical hardware access.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.metal-96xl is a bare-metal, memory-optimized server with 384 vCPUs, 3072 GB RAM, and 200 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale in-memory databases.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.metal-96xl is a bare-metal server with 384 vCPUs, 3072 GB RAM, and 200 Gbps bandwidth for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A bare-metal, memory-optimized instance featuring 384 vCPUs, three terabytes of RAM, and high-speed 200 Gbps network connectivity.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel x86_64 architecture with 192 physical cores and 384 vCPUs.
3072.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.
High-speed network connectivity with 200 Gbps baseline bandwidth.
Bare-metal deployment eliminating virtualization hypervisor overhead.
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the hardware profile.
Optimized for in-memory databases, enterprise ERPs, and large-scale data analytics.
